name: ENDLOOP
short_description: You are trapped in an endless stairway with no end in sight. Solve twisted puzzles and maybe you will escape your fate.
detailed_description:
Story

You arrive at your apartment complex after a hard day's work, but something isn't right. The elevator is broken, the lights are dimmed and the whole layout feels wrong. You ask yourself, is this place even real?

As you ascend the staircase towards the 9th floor, where your apartment is located, you get an ominous feeling that something or someone doesn't want you there.

Gameplay

ENDLOOP is horror game where you are stuck in a stairway loop. You need to solve puzzles, escape random rooms and stay away from danger to progress and hopefully escape with your life still intact.

Features

  • Infinite stairway
  • Randomized events
  • Puzzles based on logic and observation
  • Random rooms with escape room like gameplay
  • Every playthrough is different
  • Multiple endings

Steaming

Streaming and monetize is allowed if name and link to the game is present in the description.

English*, Spanish - Spain, Simplified Chinese, Japanese, Korean
*languages with full audio support
